# Sparkline

undefined

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/sparkline
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="sparkline"
  example={0}
  code={`<Sparkline data={[4, 6, 5, 8, 7, 9, 6, 10, 12, 9, 13, 11]} aria-label="Revenue, last 12 weeks" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Sparkline data={[4, 6, 5, 8, 7, 9, 6, 10, 12, 9, 13, 11]} aria-label="Revenue, last 12 weeks" />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="sparkline"
  example={1}
  code={`<Sparkline data={[4, 6, 5, 8, 7, 9, 6, 10, 12, 9, 13, 11]} tone="success" area showLastPoint aria-label="Signups trend" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Sparkline
  data={[4, 6, 5, 8, 7, 9, 6, 10, 12, 9, 13, 11]}
  tone="success"
  area
  showLastPoint
  aria-label="Signups trend"
/>
```

## Props

| Prop            | Type       | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                                                |
| --------------- | ---------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `data`          | `number[]` | Yes      | -       | Series of numbers, left → right. Needs at least two points to draw a line.                                                                                 |
| `width`         | `number`   | No       | -       | Intrinsic width in px (the SVG still scales to its box). Default \`80\`.                                                                                   |
| `height`        | `number`   | No       | -       | Intrinsic height in px. Default \`24\`.                                                                                                                    |
| `tone`          | `Tone`     | No       | -       | Tone for the line / area / point. Default \`accent\`.                                                                                                      |
| `area`          | `boolean`  | No       | -       | Fill the area beneath the line.                                                                                                                            |
| `showLastPoint` | `boolean`  | No       | -       | Mark the final data point.                                                                                                                                 |
| `strokeWidth`   | `number`   | No       | -       | Line thickness in px. Default \`1.5\`.                                                                                                                     |
| `'aria-label'`  | `string`   | No       | -       | Accessible label, e.g. "Revenue, last 30 days". When omitted the sparkline is<br />decorative (\`aria-hidden\`) — pair it with adjacent text in that case. |

## Variants

No recipe variants are documented for this component.
